name: Gonnect
author: João Pedro Neto (2000) / AGP port
description: A connection game played with Go rules. Place stones on an NxN board (Black first); standard Go captures apply (remove enemy groups with no liberties), suicide is illegal and positional superko forbids repeating a position. You win by connecting your two opposite edges with an unbroken orthogonal chain of your stones — not by capturing or territory. No passing: a player with no legal move loses.
